title: Revolve Group (RVLV) Beats Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Revolve Group delivered strong fourth-quarter 2024 results, surpassing analyst expectations on both earnings and revenue metrics. The company reported earnings of $0.17 per diluted share, exceeding the estimate of $0.10 by 70%, and revenue of $293.7 million, beating estimates of $282.67 million by 4.26%. Net sales increased 14% year-over-year to $294 million, marking strong momentum across both the REVOLVE and FWRD segments. The REVOLVE segment achieved 15% sales growth, while FWRD grew 11%, demonstrating broad-based strength. International markets contributed meaningfully with 14% growth, offsetting challenging geopolitical conditions. Adjusted EBITDA surged 114% year-over-year to $18 million, reflecting significant operational leverage and cost management improvements. The company successfully reduced return rates by over 2 percentage points year-over-year, contributing to lower fulfillment costs and improved profitability. Looking ahead, management guided gross margins of 52.4%-52.9% for 2025, with marketing spend of 14.9%-15.1% of net sales, targeting continued profitable growth while investing in emerging opportunities and physical retail expansion.
